markdown.headingText: The UCR Library Graduate Research Core Competencies Badge
markdown.markdown:
The **UCR Library Graduate Research Core Competencies Badge** is a self-paced online microcredential developed by the **UC Riverside Library** to support graduate students at all stages of their research journey.

### Program Goals

By completing this microcredential, graduate students gain practical, transferable skills to:

- Conduct, manage, and disseminate their research **ethically and efficiently**
- Understand key concepts and practices in academic publishing and open access publishing
- Increase their **research visibility** and academic profiles
- Navigate UCR's **graduation requirements** with confidence

### Who This Is For

This badge is designed for **all UCR graduate students**, regardless of discipline or career stage, whether you are just starting your program or preparing to file your dissertation.

---

## Program Structure

The badge consists of **seven modules** that can be completed in any order:

| Module | Topic |
|---|---|
| 1 | Citation Management |
| 2 | Scholarly Communication |
| 3 | Data Management |
| 4 | Literature Review Strategies |
| 5 | Publish & Share Your Research |
| 6 | Graduate Academic Affairs |
| 7 (Capstone) | Research Plan |

A badge is awarded upon completion of all modules and the capstone assignment.

---

## Developed By

This microcredential program was developed by the **UC Riverside Library** in partnership with the **UCR Graduate Division**.

**Key contributors:**

- **Dr. Jing Han** — Digital Scholarship Librarian · [jingh@ucr.edu](mailto:jingh@ucr.edu)
- **Dr. Barbara Martinez Neda** — Research Data Scientist · [barbara.martinezneda@ucr.edu](mailto:barbara.martinezneda@ucr.edu)
- **Mary-Michelle Moore** — STEM Teaching Librarian · [marymichelle.moore@ucr.edu](mailto:marymichelle.moore@ucr.edu)
- **Michele Potter** — STEM Collection Strategist · [michele.potter@ucr.edu](mailto:michele.potter@ucr.edu)
- **Jessica Renteria** — Graduate Student Affairs Officer · [jessica.renteria@ucr.edu](mailto:jessica.renteria@ucr.edu)
- **Elisa Cortez** — Medical Education and Clinical Outreach Librarian · [elisa.cortez@ucr.edu](mailto:elisa.cortez@ucr.edu)

**Library website:** [library.ucr.edu](https://library.ucr.edu)

**UCR Graduate Division website:** [graduate.ucr.edu](https://graduate.ucr.edu/)

---

## Technical Notes

This site is built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org) and hosted on [GitHub Pages](https://jinghanlib.github.io/grcc-certificate/). This is the accompanying website for the Canvas course. The website is designed to streamline the learners' experience. All assignments need to be submitted on Canvas to get points.

To report issues or suggest improvements, please open an issue on [GitHub](https://github.com/jinghanlib/grcc-certificate).
